title: Give Now
excerpt: If you prefer to pay by check, please forward your gift to: CBM – Development Department, 5342 Tilly Mill Rd, Dunwoody, GA 30338. Please be sure to include your contact information. If the gift is in memory or in honor of an individual, please include name and address of where you would like the tribute […]
contentHtml: If you prefer to pay by check, please forward your gift to: CBM – Development Department, 5342 Tilly Mill Rd, Dunwoody, GA 30338. Please be sure to include your contact information. If the gift is in memory or in honor of an individual, please include name and address of where you would like the tribute card sent. If you have any questions, please contact Bonnie Brodsky at 678.812.4151.
contentText:
If you prefer to pay by check, please forward your gift to: CBM – Development Department, 5342 Tilly Mill Rd, Dunwoody, GA 30338. Please be sure to include your contact information. If the gift is in memory or in honor of an individual, please include name and address of where you would like the tribute card sent. If you have any questions, please contact 
Bonnie Brodsky
 at 678.812.4151.
